remaining_params.SpellDescription: Dissolve — Put target creature card with mana value X exiled with CARDNAME into its owner's graveyard.
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature card exiled with CARDNAME with mana value X

params.TriggerDescription: Engulf — When CARDNAME enters, exile target non-Ooze creature an opponent controls until CARDNAME leaves the battlefield.
